def positive_model_to_device_in_loop():
    rule_id = "model_to_device_in_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Models or tensors are moved to a device repeatedly inside loops."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
